data.description: The U.S. dollar index gains 0.2% to 99.057, hitting its highest point since April 13.

data.title: FLUENT Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: Long-term indebtedness has been lowered by making partial prepayments, resulting in a stronger product portfolio and an increase in wholesale growth. This strategic move has significantly reduced the outstanding debt, making the company more financially secure and competitive. This reduction in long-term indebtedness has been made possible by making partial payments and focusing on strengthening the product offerings and expanding wholesale operations. This approach has not only improved the financial health of the company but has also positioned it for future growth and success in the market.
U.S. stock futures weaken as S&P 500 futures fall 0.3% and Nasdaq futures turn lower by 0.3%.

data.title: CUPE BC Convenes Annual Convention in Victoria
data.description: In Victoria, British Columbia, the largest union in B.C. is focused on protecting essential public services and the rights of workers providing them. CUPE BC, the provincial arm of the Canadian Union of Public Employees, began its yearly convention with more than 500 union members and attendees from various regions. Karen Ranalletta, president of CUPE BC, emphasized the importance of supporting members in the province during the 4-day event.
USD/JPY climbs to 160.505, marking the strongest level since July 2024.
European equity futures remain under pressure as EUROSTOXX 50 and DAX futures drop 1.0%, while FTSE futures ease 0.2%.

data.title: 9 crypto scam centers dismantled by US, UAE and China. Meanwhile, European police nabbed 10 people, shut 3 scam centers; over $58M stolen.
data.description: During a recent operation, authorities in Europe apprehended ten individuals and dismantled three fraudulent call centers. These facilities were responsible for swindling an approximate total of $58 million from victims across the globe.
Fun fact: the combined capex of the four major U.S. hyperscalers has now surpassed $700 billion. That’s an increase of $300 billion year-over-year, or roughly 70% growth.

data.title: 2026 ESMO GC | Mabwell to Present Latest Clinical Data on 9MW2821 for Cervical Cancer in Oral and Poster Presentations
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in Shanghai, Mabwell (688062.SH, 02493.HK), a biopharmaceutical company focused on innovation, disclosed the outcomes of two recent clinical trials involving their new Nectin-4 targeting ADC, known as R&D code 9MW2821, designed for cervical cancer treatment.

data.title: FAIR Congratulates Congress on Passing Budget Resolution Needed to Begin Reconciliation Process
data.description: In a significant development on April 30, 2026, the House of Representatives successfully passed the Budget Resolution aimed at overcoming Democrats' resistance to immigration enforcement. This crucial step is essential in providing necessary funding to the agencies operating under the Department of Homeland Security. The resolution's approval marks a milestone in addressing the challenges posed by the current immigration policies. The passing of the resolution signifies progress in securing support and resources for enforcing immigration laws effectively.

data.title: Elite Robots Launches RoboBarista to Revolutionize Self-Service Coffee Experiences in Commercial and Public Spaces
data.description: Elite Robots, a top player in collaborative robotics, unveiled RoboBarista on April 30, 2026. The autonomous coffee station is tailor-made for busy commercial areas, offering a blend of precision cobot technology and top-tier brewing capabilities. This innovation marks a step forward in the realm of automated coffee services.
